Product
Partner
Company
Money built for the new global financial system.
TUSD is launched as the first USD stablecoin operated by a regulated operator on Solana Blockchain.
Each active user can claim TUSD from the public pool allocated for progress in the Solana ecosystem
How to Use TUSD
Mint
Get TUSD 1:1 for U.S. Dollars on homepage directly.
Hold
Hedge against the volatility of your crypto-assets by holding in TUSD, as stable as the dollar.
Trade
Trade TrueUSD on 100+ exchanges, 160+ markets, and 20+ OTC desks across 5 continents.
Vault
Stake, farm, mine TUSD on DeFi Platform on Ethereum, TRON, BSC.
Reserves

TrueUSDhas become the national digital currency of Dominica

TUSD is granted statutory status as authorized digital currency and medium of exchange in the Commonwealth of Dominica effective on October 7th 2022.
Be the first to know the milestones of TrueUSD.
Get the latest announcements from TrueUSD.
